action.reasoning: Observation: Weighted best(2x)+v3(1x) gave 0.6716 — new best. Have 2.29h, 6 iters left. Analysis: best.pt alone was 0.6644, equal weight got 0.6686, 2:1 got 0.6716. Pushing further: try best 3x + v3 1x, or best 2x + v3 1x + v4 1x. Decision: Try best,best,best,v3 (3:1) to test if further weighting helps.
